✅ Checklist 💰 Budget

Budget 💰

Cost tracking · Estimates · Actuals

Budget / Presupuesto 💰

← Back to overview / Volver al inicio

Costs are for all 4 passengers unless noted. Estimates marked with ~.

Los costos son para los 4 pasajeros a menos que se indique. Estimaciones marcadas con ~.

Flights / Vuelos

Route Airline Status Cost (USD)
BOG → PTY → SFO Copa CM416 + CM382 ✅ Confirmed Included in ticket
SFO → NRT ZIPAIR ZG025 ✅ Confirmed Included in ticket
KIX → HKG HK Express ⬜ Pending ~$234 (2 adults × $117, kids discounted)
HKG → PEK Cathay Pacific ⬜ Pending ~$522 (2 adults × $261, kids discounted)
PEK → NRT Spring Japan ⬜ Pending ~$332 (2 adults × $166, kids discounted)
NRT → SFO ZIPAIR ZG026 ✅ Confirmed Included in ticket
SFO → PTY → BOG Copa CM383 + CM415 ✅ Confirmed Included in ticket
ZIPAIR checked bags ZIPAIR Both ways ~$340 (2 bags × $85 × 2 ways)
Subtotal Flights     ~$1,428

Vuelos pendientes: precios por adulto investigados Mar 2026. Ninos menores de 2 (Diego) generalmente gratis o 10% en regazo. Lyam (4) puede tener descuento infantil en algunas aerolineas.

Accommodations / Alojamientos

City Nights Est. $/Night Est. Total
SF outbound 1 ~$150 ~$150
Narita (arrival) 1 ~$70 ~$70
Tokyo 4 ~$85 ~$340
Nagoya 1 ~$70 ~$70
Kyoto 2 ~$85 ~$170
Shenzhen 2 ~$50 ~$100
Guilin 1 ~$47 ~$47
Yangshuo 1 ~$55 ~$55
Guilin (return) 1 ~$47 ~$47
Beijing 3 ~$65 ~$195
Narita 1 ~$70 ~$70
SF return 1 ~$150 ~$150
TOTAL 20 nights   ~$1,464

Cambios vs plan anterior: Shenzhen 2 noches (~$100) reemplaza HK 1 noche (~$100) + SZ 1 noche ($57). Ahorra ~$57.

Internal Transport / Transporte Interno

Route Type Est. Cost (USD)
Narita Skyliner (NRT → Ueno) Keisei e-ticket ~$29 (2 adults, kids free)
Tokyo metro (4 days) Suica IC Card ~$40
Tokyo → Nagoya (Shinkansen Nozomi) SmartEX app ~$139 (2 adults, kids free on lap)
Nagoya → Kyoto (Shinkansen Nozomi) SmartEX app ~$68 (2 adults, kids free on lap)
Kyoto buses/metro (2 days) IC Card ~$20
Kyoto ↔ Nara (round trip) JR Miyakoji Rapid ~$18 (2 adults)
Kyoto → KIX (Haruka Express) JR West tourist ticket ~$28 (2 adults)
HKG → Shenzhen (high-speed train) MTR West Kowloon → Futian ~$20 (2 adults, kids free)
Shenzhen metro + taxis Various ~$30
SZ North → Guilin (Tren G) 12306.cn ~$71–113 (2 adults, 2nd class)
Guilin → Yangshuo Li River Cruise ~$120–200
Yangshuo → Guilin Bus ~$15
Guilin → SZ North (Tren G) 12306.cn ~$71–113 (2 adults, 2nd class)
Shenzhen → HKG airport Futian→W. Kowloon + Airport Express ~$37
Beijing metro + taxis Various ~$50
Great Wall Mutianyu transport Tour/car ~$80
Naritasan area + NRT Local ~$20
Subtotal Transport   ~$856–1,000

Activities / Actividades

Activity Location Est. Cost (USD) Notes
TeamLab Planets Tokyo ~$61–91 ⚠️ Book 1 month ahead
Ueno Zoo Tokyo ~$8 Kids free
LEGOLAND Japan Nagoya ~$90–131 Diego free (under 3)
Nagoya Castle Nagoya ~$7 Kids free
Nagoya Port Aquarium Nagoya ~$30 Diego free (under 4)
Monkey Park Iwatayama Kyoto ~$13 Cash only
Todai-ji + Nara deer Nara ~$11 Kids free
Window of the World Shenzhen ~$61 Kids likely free
Elephant Trunk Hill Guilin FREE Free since 2022
Li River Cruise (4-star) Guilin→Yangshuo ~$97–125 ⚠️ Book ahead (peak)
Yulong River cycling Yangshuo ~$14–28 ⚠️ Raft: kids under 6 banned
Forbidden City Beijing ~$17 ⚠️ Book 7 days ahead!
Great Wall Mutianyu (+ chairlift + toboggan) Beijing ~$51 Kids free (under 1.2m)
Hanfu experience Beijing ~$42–83 —
Subtotal Activities   ~$502–656  

Food / Comida

Location Days Est. per Day (USD) Est. Total (USD)
San Francisco 2 ~$80 ~$160
Japan 8 ~$80–120 ~$640–960
Shenzhen 2 ~$40–60 ~$80–120
Guilin/Yangshuo 3 ~$30–50 ~$90–150
Beijing 3 ~$40–70 ~$120–210
Narita 1 ~$50 ~$50
Flights/transit 2 ~$30 ~$60
Subtotal Food 21 days   ~$1,200–1,710

Other / Otros

Item Est. Cost (USD)
Travel insurance (family) ~$200–400
China visa (4 pax × ~$311,000 COP) ~$330 USD
Travel eSIM (Japan + China, 2 plans) ~$40–80
Pocket WiFi rental (backup) ~$30–50
Souvenirs / shopping ~$200–500
Emergency fund ~$300
Subtotal Other ~$970–1,930

Grand Total / Total General

Category Low Estimate High Estimate
Flights (pending + bags) $1,428 $1,428
Accommodations $1,464 $1,580
Internal Transport $856 $1,000
Activities $502 $656
Food $1,200 $1,710
Other $970 $1,930
TOTAL (excluding confirmed flights) $6,420 $8,304

Ahorro vs plan anterior: ~$600–750 USD gracias a ruta invertida (HK→SZ→Guilin vs Beijing→SZflight→Guilin→HK).

Este presupuesto NO incluye los vuelos ya confirmados de Copa y ZIPAIR.

Alvarez-Rincon Family · Sep 1–21, 2026 · BOG → SFO → Japan → China → SFO → BOG
